instructions: OpenCode skill tool: stage skills are mirrored under .opencode/skills/<name>/ (sync from skill/ via scripts/sync-opencode-skills.ps1 or scripts/sync-opencode-skills.sh). Load a stage with the skill tool using the YAML `name` (e.g. run-init, design-intake). Umbrella: skill/SKILL.md; lite merged flow: skill/SKILL-LITE.md — do not duplicate those under .opencode/skills.
